text.div:
Generated Narrative: CodeSystem hiv-prevention-services-cs

This case-sensitive code system http://fhir.et/core/CodeSystem/hiv-prevention-services-cs defines the following codes:

CodeDisplay
condoms Offer male and female condoms and condom-compatible lubricants
prep Offer pre-exposure prophylaxis (PrEP) for people at substantial ongoing risk of HIV infection
pep Offer post-exposure prophylaxis (PEP) following suspected exposure
vmmc Voluntary medical male circumcision (VMMC)
harm-reduction Harm reduction for people who inject drugs
behavioural Behavioural interventions to support risk reduction, particularly for people with HIV and members of key populations
partner-testing HIV testing for partners and biological children
key-population HIV testing for partners and social contacts of people from key populations, where appropriate

name: HIVPreventionServicesCS
title: HIV Prevention Services and Referrals CodeSystem
description: Prevention services offered and referrals provided
